name: core-learning
description: Analyze any project's internals (Python, Go, Rust, Node.js, C#, Ruby, Java, etc.) inside-out and build simplified Java reimplementations with progressive learning — includes core-blueprint (outline planning with Mermaid visualizations) and core-builder (feature implementation with 10-section tutorials, structured Insight blocks, and architecture diagrams) skills, powered by specialized agents for source code exploration, architecture design, and quality review with confidence scoring
